# exportBaseAsPDF()

**Instance Method**

Exports the base part of this document to a `PDFDocument`.

## Declaration

```swift
func exportBaseAsPDF() async -> PDFDocument
```

## Return Value

The base part of this document as a `PDFDocument`.

## Exporting the parts

- **exportParts(identifiedBy:)**: Given a set of part identifiers, return a dictionary of part ID to part data.
- **export(partIDs:)**: Given a set of part identifiers, return a dictionary of part ID to data objects for the requested layers.
